mapper.sql: movie_id, name, alias, actors, cover, directors, douban_score, score, douban_votes, votes, genres, imdb_id, languages, mins, regions, release_date, storyline, year, writers
mapper.select: SELECT m.movie_id, m.name, m.cover, m.douban_score, m.year, m.regions, m.genres FROM movies m INNER JOIN stats_hot_movies s ON m.movie_id = s.movie_id WHERE s.calc_date = CURRENT_DATE AND s.period_type = 'DAILY' ORDER BY s.hot_score DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT m.movie_id AS movieId, m.name, m.cover, m.douban_score AS doubanScore, m.year, m.regions, m.genres, s.hot_score AS hotScore, s.calc_date AS calcDate, s.period_type AS period FROM stats_hot_movies s INNER JOIN movies m ON m.movie_id = s.movie_id WHERE s.period_type = #{period} AND s.calc_date = (SELECT MAX(calc_date) FROM stats_hot_movies WHERE period_type = #{period}) ORDER BY s.hot_score DESC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO movies (movie_id, name, alias, actors, cover, directors, douban_score, score, douban_votes, votes, genres, imdb_id, languages, mins, regions, release_date, storyline, year, writers) VALUES (#{id}, #{name}, #{alias}, #{actors,typeHandler=com.movie.backend.config.JsonTypeHandler}, #{cover}, #{directors,typeHandler=com.movie.backend.config.JsonTypeHandler}, #{doubanScore}, #{score}, #{doubanVotes}, #{votes}, #{genres}, #{imdbId}, #{languages}, #{mins}, #{regions}, #{releaseDate}, #{storyline}, #{year}, #{writers,typeHandler=com.movie.backend.config.JsonTypeHandler})
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM movies
(name LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR alias LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR storyline LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR directors::text LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR actors::text LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR writers::text LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')
ORDER BY douban_score DESC, year DESC
SELECT movie_id, name, cover, douban_score, douban_votes, year FROM movies WHERE douban_score IS NOT NULL ORDER BY douban_score DESC, douban_votes DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT movie_id, name, cover, douban_score, douban_votes, year FROM movies m INNER JOIN movie_genre_relation mgr ON m.movie_id = mgr.movie_id INNER JOIN genres g ON mgr.genre_id = g.id WHERE g.name = #{genre} ORDER BY m.douban_score DESC, m.year DESC
SELECT movie_id, name, cover, douban_score, douban_votes, year FROM movies WHERE year = #{year} ORDER BY douban_score DESC
SELECT movie_id, name, cover, douban_score, douban_votes, year FROM movies WHERE year IS NOT NULL ORDER BY year DESC, douban_score DESC
SELECT movie_id, name, cover, douban_score, douban_votes, year FROM movies WHERE full_search_text LIKE '%' || #{personName} || '%' ORDER BY year DESC
SELECT name FROM genres ORDER BY name
SELECT name FROM regions ORDER BY name
SELECT name FROM languages ORDER BY name
SELECT DISTINCT year FROM movies WHERE year IS NOT NULL ORDER BY year DESC
